description_long: This is a tall, slender male figure with exaggerated facial features, including a wide, sinister grin and sharply arched eyebrows. He is dressed in a formal, tailored suit with a long tailcoat, adorned with a large flower on the lapel and a prominent bow tie. The suit features a vest, a shirt with a high collar, and decorative buttons, giving the appearance of a theatrical or villainous character. His hands are gloved, and his shoes are formal, matching the overall elegant yet menacing style. The hair is styled back and appears voluminous, adding to the dramatic effect. The overall appearance is striking, with a combination of sharp lines and detailed accessories that evoke a sense of flamboyance and intimidation.
description: A tall, slender male in a formal tailcoat suit with dramatic facial features and theatrical accessories, exuding a villainous and flamboyant presence.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide grin, detailed suit with bow tie, flower lapel, and gloved hands outstretched.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the length of the tailcoat, and the slim silhouette.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the tailcoat, the fitted suit, and the hairstyle from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, hand position, and tailcoat details.
attribute_clothing_type: formal tailcoat suit with vest, high-collared shirt, bow tie, gloves, and decorative flower accessory
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended outward
